_instructions: Curated projects. Each needs a technologies[] array (loader maps over it).

projects.title: Credit-Card Fraud Detection
projects.description: A credit-card fraud detection app that serves Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost models behind a Flask interface, returning a fraud probability and risk tier per transaction. Training balances classes with SMOTE and logs runs to MLflow, and a LangChain + OpenAI layer adds a plain-language explanation for each prediction — all packaged with Docker.

projects.title: Supply-Chain Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive Streamlit dashboard for supply-chain optimization — pairing Prophet demand forecasts (tracked with MAE/RMSE accuracy) with inventory calculations for safety stock and reorder points, plus supplier on-time and lead-time analytics, all explorable through Plotly charts and filters.

projects.title: HR Analytics KPI Dashboard
projects.description: A three-page Power BI dashboard analyzing HR gender diversity and inclusion across a 500-employee organization — visualizing headcount, hiring, promotions, turnover, performance ratings, and executive gender balance, all sliceable by job level, department, region, and age group.
